name: BLOOM-7B1
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (ALiBi positional encoding, GPT-2-style, GeLU)
note: 7.07B multilingual BLOOM checkpoint, the practical size for downstream fine-tuning and local deployment.

results.notes: acc_norm on ARC-Challenge (25-shot), from the raw lm-evaluation-harness run for bigscience/bloom-7b1 in the HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 per-model details dataset (results_2023-08-01T14:42:42.953249.json, key harness|arc:challenge|25).
acc_norm on HellaSwag (10-shot), same primary results file, key harness|hellaswag|10.
mc2 score on TruthfulQA, same primary results file, key harness|truthfulqa:mc|0.
acc on Winogrande (5-shot), from results_2023-10-19T04-28-54.166367.json in the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 details dataset.
acc on GSM8K (5-shot), from the final results_2023-12-04T13-10-02.911977.json re-run in the same details dataset. An earlier Oct 2023 run showed 0.76%; this is the last published value.

Approximate MMLU average. The Open LLM Leaderboard v1 raw file stores 57 per-subject harness|hendrycksTest-<subject>|5 scores rather than one aggregate key; manually averaging those subjects yields ~26.7%, closely matching the ~26.25% figure independently reported by the llm-explorer.com aggregator for the same model/eval. Treat as approximate given the manual averaging.

pass@1 on HumanEval for bigscience/bloom-7b1 (7.1B params), listed in Table I of Martinez, "The Impact of Hyperparameters on Large Language Model Inference Performance" (UPC-BarcelonaTech, arXiv:2408.01050). A separate independent survey reported a very close 7.73% for the same model/benchmark, corroborating the figure.
acc_norm on BBH (Big-Bench-Hard), from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated eval results for bigscience/bloom-7b1.
acc_norm on GPQA, same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 results file.
prompt-level strict accuracy on IFEval, same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 results file.
acc on MMLU-Pro, same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 results file. Distinct benchmark from plain MMLU, mapped to its own mmlu-pro slug.

EU21-MMLU (DeepL-translated MMLU across 21 EU languages), Thellmann et al. 2024 'Towards Multilingual LLM Evaluation for European Languages', Table 13. HF checkpoint bigscience/bloom-7b1, exact name/size match.

MATH (Level-5/hard subset), exact_match on the leaderboard_math_hard task, from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v2 automated-eval results file already used in the corpus for this model's bbh/gpqa/ifeval/mmlu-pro rows (results_2025-02-13T18-27-04.338360.json, key leaderboard_math_hard: exact_match,none=0.005287). Not previously tracked for this model. Verified against the raw JSON directly (fetched via curl).

verificationNotes: Confirmed on HF model card: 7,069,016,064 params (7.069B) exact match; RAIL v1.0 license; 2048-token context; 45 natural + 12 programming = 57 languages matches langCount exactly. Page states training ended ~July 5, 2022, consistent with the July 11, 2022 public release date shared across the BLOOM checkpoint family. No changes made.
